title: Simply Minimal
description: The list of mods if you are experiencing issues with your FPS or if you on a low-end PC or laptop, or just want a lightweight modpack.
body: Simply Minimal is a modpack full of lightweight mods you will enjoy! It will provide you mods which will help you increase your FPS, maybe it will be playable for you if you on a low-end device, or if you just want a modpack that you will enjoy. The modpacks is constantly getting updated to the latest version.
